name: PR intent already landed on base (high-confidence)
description: The PR's intent — adding input validation to the import path — already shipped on main in an earlier commit. The already-solved check should return a high-confidence positive and name the resolving commit.
pr_title: Add input validation to import path
pr_body: Validates the uploaded payload before parsing so empty/malformed input is rejected early.
pr_diff:
--- a/importer.py
+++ b/importer.py
@@ -1,4 +1,7 @@
 def import_payload(payload):
+    if not payload:
+        raise ValueError('empty payload')
     return parse(payload)
